title: Vindhyeshwari Chalisa
intro: Shri Vindhyeshwari Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Vindhyeshwari
description:
|| Shri Vindhyeshwari Chalisa ||

Shri Ganeshaya Namah.
Shri Swami Samarthaya Namah.

|| Doha ||
Namo namo Vindhyeshwari, namo namo jagadamba.
Sant janon ke kaaj mein, karti nahi vilamba.

|| Chaupai ||
Jay jay jay Vindhyachal Rani.
Aadi shakti jag vidit Bhavani.
Singh vahini jay jagmata.
Jay jay jay tribhuvan sukhdata.
Kasht nivarini jay jag devi.
Jay jay sant asur sur sevi.
Mahima amit apaar tumhari.
Shesh sahas mukh varnat haari.
Deenan ke dukh harat Bhavani.
Nahi dekhyo tum sam kou daani.
Sab kar mansa purvat mata.
Mahima amit jagat vikhyata.
Jo jan dhyan tumharo lave.
So turatahin vanchhit phal pave.
Tu hi Vaishnavi tu hi Rudrani.
Tu hi Sharada aru Brahmani.
Rama Radhika Shyama Kaali.
Tu hi maat santan pratipali.
Uma Madhavi Chandi Jwala.
Begi mohi par hohu dayala.
Tum hi Hinglaj maharani.
Tum hi Sheetala aru vigyani.
Durga durg vinashini mata.
Tumhin Lakshmi jag sukh data.
Tum hi Jahnavi aru Utrani.
Hemavati Ambe nirvani.
Asht bhuji Varahini deva.
Karat Vishnu Shiv jakar seva.
Chausatti devi kalyani.
Gauri Mangala sab gun khani.
Patan Mumba Danta Kumari.
Bhadrakali sun vinay hamari.
Vajra dharini shok nashini.
Aayu rakshini Vindhyavasini.
Jaya aur Vijaya Baitali.
Maatu sankati aru vikarali.
Naam anant tumhar Bhavani.
Barnai kimi manush agyani.
Japar kripa maatu tav hoi.
To vah karai chahai man joi.
Kripa karahu mopaar maharani.
Siddh kariye ab yah mam baani.
Jo nar dharai maatu kar dhyana.
Taakar sada hoy kalyana.
Bipatti taahi sapnehu nahin aavai.
Jo devi ka jaap karavai.
Jo nar kahe rin hoy apaara.
So nar path kare satbaara.
Nishchay rinmochan hoi jaai.
Jo nar path kare man maai.
Astuti jo nar padhai padhavai.
Ya jag mein so bahu sukh paavai.
Jako byadhi satavai bhai.
Jaap karat sab door paraai.
Jo nar ati bandi mahan hoi.
Baar hazaar path kar soi.
Nishchay bandi te chhut jaai.
Satya vachan mam manahu bhai.
Japar jo kuch sankat hoi.
Nishchay debihi sumirai soi.
Ja kahan putra hoy nahi bhai.
So nar ya vidhi karai upaai.
Paanch baras so path karavai.
Nauratar mahan vipra jimavai.
Nishchay hohi prasann Bhavani.
Putra dehi taakahan gun khani.
Dhvaja nariyal aan chadavai.
Vidhi samet pujan karavai.
Nit prati path karai man laai.
Prem sahit nahi aan upaai.
Yah Shri Vindhyachal Chalisa.
Rank padhat hovai avnisa.
Yah jani achraj manahu bhai.
Kripa drishti japar hui jaai.
Jay jay jay jag maatu Bhavani.
Kripa karahu mohi par jan jaani.

|| Iti Shri Vindhyeshwari Chalisa ||

|| Shri Gurudattatreyarpanmastu ||
|| Shri Swami Samartharpan Mastu ||
meaning:
|| Shri Vindhyeshwari Chalisa ||

Shri Ganeshaya Namah.
Salutations to Lord Ganesha.
Shri Swami Samarthaya Namah.
Salutations to Shri Swami Samarth.

|| Doha ||
Namo namo Vindhyeshwari, namo namo jagadamba.
Salutations to Vindhyeshwari, salutations to the Mother of the Universe.
Sant janon ke kaaj mein, karti nahi vilamba.
You do not delay in fulfilling the tasks of the saints and devotees.

|| Chaupai ||
Jay jay jay Vindhyachal Rani.
Victory, victory, victory to the Queen of Vindhyachal.
Aadi shakti jag vidit Bhavani.
You are the Primal Energy (Aadi Shakti), known to the world as Bhavani.
Singh vahini jay jagmata.
Victory to the Lion-rider, the Mother of the world.
Jay jay jay tribhuvan sukhdata.
Victory, victory, victory to the one who gives happiness to the three worlds.
Kasht nivarini jay jag devi.
Victory to the Goddess who removes suffering.
Jay jay sant asur sur sevi.
Victory to the one served by saints, demons, and gods alike.
Mahima amit apaar tumhari.
Your glory is infinite and boundless.
Shesh sahas mukh varnat haari.
Even Shesh (the serpent) with a thousand mouths fails to describe it.
Deenan ke dukh harat Bhavani.
Bhavani, you remove the sorrows of the poor and distressed.
Nahi dekhyo tum sam kou daani.
I have not seen any benefactor as generous as you.
Sab kar mansa purvat mata.
Mother, you fulfill the desires of all.
Mahima amit jagat vikhyata.
Your glory is infinite and renowned across the world.
Jo jan dhyan tumharo lave.
The person who meditates upon you.
So turatahin vanchhit phal pave.
Immediately attains the fruits they desire.
Tu hi Vaishnavi tu hi Rudrani.
You are Vaishnavi and you are Rudrani.
Tu hi Sharada aru Brahmani.
You are Sharada and you are Brahmani.
Rama Radhika Shyama Kaali.
You are Rama, Radhika, Shyama, and Kali.
Tu hi maat santan pratipali.
You are the Mother who protects the saints.
Uma Madhavi Chandi Jwala.
You are Uma, Madhavi, Chandi, and Jwala.
Begi mohi par hohu dayala.
Please be merciful to me quickly.
Tum hi Hinglaj maharani.
You are the great Queen Hinglaj.
Tum hi Sheetala aru vigyani.
You are Sheetala and the possessor of supreme knowledge.
Durga durg vinashini mata.
Mother Durga, you are the destroyer of fortresses (and difficulties).
Tumhin Lakshmi jag sukh data.
You are Lakshmi, the giver of happiness to the world.
Tum hi Jahnavi aru Utrani.
You are Jahnavi and Utrani.
Hemavati Ambe nirvani.
You are Hemavati, Ambe, and the provider of liberation (Nirvana).
Asht bhuji Varahini deva.
You are the eight-armed Varahini Goddess.
Karat Vishnu Shiv jakar seva.
Whom even Vishnu and Shiva serve.
Chausatti devi kalyani.
You are the 64 Goddesses and the auspicious one.
Gauri Mangala sab gun khani.
You are Gauri, Mangala, and the mine of all virtues.
Patan Mumba Danta Kumari.
You are Patan, Mumba, and Danta Kumari.
Bhadrakali sun vinay hamari.
Bhadrakali, please listen to my humble prayer.
Vajra dharini shok nashini.
You hold the thunderbolt and destroy sorrow.
Aayu rakshini Vindhyavasini.
You protect life, O Vindhyavasini.
Jaya aur Vijaya Baitali.
You are Jaya, Vijaya, and Baitali.
Maatu sankati aru vikarali.
Mother, you are the remover of troubles and also fierce.
Naam anant tumhar Bhavani.
Bhavani, your names are infinite.
Barnai kimi manush agyani.
How can an ignorant human describe them?
Japar kripa maatu tav hoi.
Upon whom your grace falls, Mother.
To vah karai chahai man joi.
They can achieve whatever they desire in their heart.
Kripa karahu mopaar maharani.
Great Queen, please bestow your grace upon me.
Siddh kariye ab yah mam baani.
Please make this prayer of mine successful.
Jo nar dharai maatu kar dhyana.
The person who meditates on the Mother.
Taakar sada hoy kalyana.
Always attains welfare.
Bipatti taahi sapnehu nahin aavai.
Trouble does not even come to them in dreams.
Jo devi ka jaap karavai.
If one chants the name of the Goddess.
Jo nar kahe rin hoy apaara.
The person who is burdened by immense debt.
So nar path kare satbaara.
Should recite this text one hundred times.
Nishchay rinmochan hoi jaai.
They will certainly be freed from debt.
Jo nar path kare man maai.
If the person recites it with a focused mind.
Astuti jo nar padhai padhavai.
The person who reads or teaches this praise.
Ya jag mein so bahu sukh paavai.
Attains great happiness in this world.
Jako byadhi satavai bhai.
O brother, the one who is troubled by disease.
Jaap karat sab door paraai.
Will see all diseases vanish by chanting this.
Jo nar ati bandi mahan hoi.
The person who is imprisoned.
Baar hazaar path kar soi.
Should recite this a thousand times.
Nishchay bandi te chhut jaai.
They will certainly be freed from bondage.
Satya vachan mam manahu bhai.
Believe my words as truth, O brother.
Japar jo kuch sankat hoi.
Whatever trouble a person may have.
Nishchay debihi sumirai soi.
They should certainly remember the Goddess.
Ja kahan putra hoy nahi bhai.
O brother, for those who do not have a son.
So nar ya vidhi karai upaai.
They should follow this method.
Paanch baras so path karavai.
Recite this text for five years.
Nauratar mahan vipra jimavai.
And feed Brahmins during Navratri.
Nishchay hohi prasann Bhavani.
Bhavani will certainly be pleased.
Putra dehi taakahan gun khani.
And grant them a son who is a mine of virtues.
Dhvaja nariyal aan chadavai.
Offer a flag and coconut with devotion.
Vidhi samet pujan karavai.
And perform the worship with proper rituals.
Nit prati path karai man laai.
Recite it daily with a dedicated mind.
Prem sahit nahi aan upaai.
With love; there is no other remedy.
Yah Shri Vindhyachal Chalisa.
This Shri Vindhyachal Chalisa.
Rank padhat hovai avnisa.
Makes a poor person wealthy (like a king).
Yah jani achraj manahu bhai.
Do not be surprised by this, O brother.
Kripa drishti japar hui jaai.
Once Her grace falls upon you.
Jay jay jay jag maatu Bhavani.
Victory, victory, victory to the Mother of the World, Bhavani.
Kripa karahu mohi par jan jaani.
Please bestow your grace upon me, considering me your devotee.

|| Iti Shri Vindhyeshwari Chalisa ||
Thus ends the Shri Vindhyeshwari Chalisa.

|| Shri Gurudattatreyarpanmastu ||
May this be offered to Shri Guru Dattatreya.
|| Shri Swami Samartharpan Mastu ||
May this be offered to Shri Swami Samarth.

faq.q1: Why is the Vindhyeswari Chalisa recited?
faq.a1: It is recited to seek the blessings of Maa Vindhyavasini (Vindhyeswari), to remove obstacles from life, and to fulfill one's heartfelt desires.
faq.q2: What is the most auspicious day to read the Vindhyeswari Chalisa?
faq.a2: Reciting it during Navratri is extremely rewarding. Additionally, Tuesdays and Sundays are considered very auspicious for worshiping the Goddess and reciting her Chalisa.
faq.q3: Is it necessary to visit a temple to read it?
faq.a3: No, the Goddess resides in the hearts of her devotees. You can recite it with full devotion at your home shrine.
faq.q4: What are the benefits of regular recitation?
faq.a4: Regular recitation brings positive energy into the home, resolves family conflicts, and ensures the special grace of the Goddess.
faq.q5: Are there any specific rules for this Chalisa?
faq.a5: Maa Vindhyeswari is very compassionate. You can recite this Chalisa with a clean body, a calm mind, and full dedication; no complex rules are mandatory.
